entry.title: How to express `select * from user where id = ? or name = ? and age = ?` in GoooQo
在GoooQo中怎么表达select * from user where id = ? or (name = ? and age = ?)
What?! Go Implementation of OQM Can Build CRUD in Just Two Lines?
entry.summary: This is all thanks to the support of OQM (Object Query-Language Mapping) technology, we developed a Go version called GoooQo.
entry.content: This is all thanks to the support of OQM (Object Query-Language Mapping) technology, we developed a Go version called GoooQo.

entry.title: 什么?！Golang里两行代码就能搞定增删查改接口了？
entry.summary: 这都得益于OQM（Object Query-Language Mapping）技术的加持，我们开发了一个Go版本的实现，GoooQo 。
entry.content: 这都得益于OQM（Object Query-Language Mapping）技术的加持，我们开发了一个Go版本的实现，GoooQo 。

entry.title: From ORM to OQM: An Object-Only SQL Construction Solution
entry.summary: Object/Relational Mapping (ORM) may lead the development of object-oriented applications based on relational databases in the wrong direction.
entry.content: Object/Relational Mapping (ORM) may lead the development of object-oriented applications based on relational databases in the wrong direction.

entry.title: 从ORM到OQM：一种基于对象的SQL语句构造方案
entry.summary: 对象/关系映射（ORM）技术在一定程度上将基于关系数据库的应用开发引向了错误的方向。一个好的技术方案应该是把事情变得越来越简单，而不是越来越复杂。
entry.content: 对象/关系映射（ORM）技术在一定程度上将基于关系数据库的应用开发引向了错误的方向。一个好的技术方案应该是把事情变得越来越简单，而不是越来越复杂。

entry.title: DoytoQuery中的关联查询方案
entry.summary: 本文介绍了DoytoQuery对N+1查询问题的解决方案，以及实体间关系的查询方案。
entry.content: 本文介绍了DoytoQuery对N+1查询问题的解决方案，以及实体间关系的查询方案。

entry.title: The Related Query Solution in DoytoQuery (for n+1 selects problem)
entry.summary: In this article, we introduced a solution in DoytoQuery to do the related query avoiding the n+1 problem.
entry.content: In this article, we introduced a solution in DoytoQuery to do the related query avoiding the n+1 problem.
